project_type: React SPA (Vite + Tailwind CSS) - Mind-map/canvas application called ThoughtFlow
build_system: Vite with npm, no test framework configured
test_framework: None - no test files or test dependencies in the project
test_command: No test command available - verify via build only
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install, 2. Run npm run build, 3. Verify no build errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22 available. No test framework configured.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Single-file architecture: App.jsx (~5800 lines) contains all state and logic. Separate panel components (ReminderPanel.jsx, TaskPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx). Uses lucide-react for icons. Tailwind CSS for styling. Keyboard shortcuts registered via useEffect with window event listeners. Timer state: showTimer, timerSeconds, timerRunning, timerPaused, timerDone, timerCustomMinutes. Reminder system uses notification queue with auto-dismiss after 8 seconds. Timer panel is a floating widget at bottom-right. Inline styles with dangerouslySetInnerHTML for keyframes.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, index.html. src/: App.jsx (main app with all state/logic), ReminderPanel.jsx (reminder settings panel), TaskPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx, main.jsx (entry), index.css (Tailwind base).
